name: Rusty Island Survival VR: Evolve
summary: Survive, craft, and escape in Rusty Island Survival VR: Evolve, an immersive open-world VR survival game. Stranded on a deadly island, you must gather resources, craft tools, and build shelters to stay alive. Explore dangerous environments, face harsh weather, and manage survival needs in this open-world survival simulator. Upgrade your gear, expand your base, and use strategy to overcome challenges. Every decision leads you closer to your goal—escape the island and survive the ultimate VR adventure.
